sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 386 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.24 & 25. 2. For orders on CMA No.437/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 10.12.2025 Mr. Ali Nawaz, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Fahad, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2022 without any progress. Even notice has not even sought / issued notice till date. Today brief is being held and adjournment is being sought on behalf of applicant for no cogent reason. In view hereof, it appears that the applicant department is not interested in present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
